title: Artifact Exploded Studies
description: Four independent museum exploded-view studies for porcelain, jade, astrolabe, and helmet artifacts without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Each image turns a different museum object into a precise educational exploded diagram, stressing material credibility, callout hierarchy, and object-specific construction logic.

en.title: Artifact Exploded Studies
en.description: Four independent museum exploded-view studies for porcelain, jade, astrolabe, and helmet artifacts.

zh-CN.title: 文物拆解单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立文物爆炸图研究，覆盖瓷器、玉器、星盘和头盔。
